rulings.Case Title: HEIDI DENTON et al VS. KWAN SHIU YAN FUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 12, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KWUN FUNG's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to August 17, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and the operative complaint to Department 501 no later than August 12, 2105 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of courtesy copies of opposition and reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. ANASTASIA GRANDY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 12, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT ANASTASIA GRANDY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of fact as to (1) the existence of the Section 8 contract; (2) substantial lack of affirmative standard habitability characteristics; and (3) notice to tenant that rent should be paid to Plaintiff. = (501/REQ)
